creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180668
Patch

https://pear.php.net/package/Text_Highlighter/download/

Changelog:

* Set minimum PHP version to 5.4.0
* Set minimum PEAR version to 1.10.1

* PHP7 compatibility: replace preg_replace with e modifier

Add License PHP301 into the Makefile

poudriere build fine for:

10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r314826)

portlint is also fine.

Cheers
jochen
